statusLine.command: bash -c 'plugin_dir=$(ls -d "${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"/plugins/cache/claude-hud/claude-hud/*/ 2>/dev/null | awk -F/ '"'"'{ print $(NF-1) "\t" $0 }'"'"' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n -k4,4n | tail -1 | cut -f2-); exec "/c/Users/shyla/.bun/bin/bun" "${plugin_dir}src/index.ts"'
